item.title: Highlight Transferable Skills 🌟 • Identify skills that apply across roles. • Use: “I led X projects, improving Y by Z%.” • Map past achievements to future roles. • Frame experience in the new industry’s terms. • Research industry jargon to adjust language. What transferable skills can you showcase in your career pivot? #careerchange #skills #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Highlight Transferable Skills 🌟 • Identify skills that apply across roles. • Use: “I led X projects, improving Y by Z%.” • Map past achievements to future roles. • Frame experience in the new industry’s terms. • Research industry jargon to adjust language. What transferable skills can you showcase in your career pivot? #careerchange #skills #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
